overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy walking through a bioluminescent tribal village built on wooden stilts at night. The character ascends through covered walkways, passes through the village center with NPCs, and reaches an open overlook to view the surrounding misty swamp and mountain landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bamboo walkway with bioluminescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking up bamboo stairs through covered village walkways following a child

notable_agents.action: child running up the stairs ahead of Aloy

entered.detail: wooden stairs made of bamboo logs leading upward through the village
green glowing organic light source attached to the structure
textured wall made of interwoven bamboo strips
overhead roof made of dried vegetation providing cover

segments.scene_description: Aloy ascends wooden bamboo stairs through a covered village walkway illuminated by green bioluminescent lanterns. The space is narrow and enclosed with woven walls and thatched roofing overhead. A child NPC runs ahead up the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village common area with central gathering tree

events.description: moving from narrow covered walkway into more open village common space

agents.ego_description: walking through the village center past sitting NPCs and wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager sitting by the path engaged in crafting or resting

entered.detail: large tree trunk integrated into the village architecture with platforms
textile banners hanging between wooden posts
open communal space with multiple huts and gathering spots

segments.scene_description: Moving through the village center, the space opens into a semi-covered common area built around a central tree structure. Villagers sit along the path, and hanging fabrics decorate the wooden architecture. The ground levels out from stairs to flat bamboo platforms.

scene_state.functional_zone: open overlook platform at village edge with panoramic views

events.description: exiting the covered village interior onto the open overlook platform
transition from artificial green lighting to natural moonlight and starlight

agents.ego_description: walking toward the edge of the village platform to reach the scenic overlook

notable_agents.action: villager standing at the overlook edge looking out at the landscape

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with scattered clouds visible overhead
mountain range silhouetted against the night sky in the distance
dark water pools and marshy areas below the platform

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the covered village through an archway onto an open bamboo platform at the settlement's edge. The sky becomes fully visible with a dark blue night atmosphere, and the lighting shifts from green bioluminescence to natural moonlight. The character approaches the overlook edge with views of distant mountains and swampy waters below.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with ancient ruins and mountain vistas

events.description: character stops walking and begins panning the camera to observe the landscape

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook panning the camera to view the misty landscape and ancient ruins

entered.detail: ancient metallic ruins and debris from a previous civilization
mist and fog settled in the valley between hills

segments.scene_description: At the open overlook, Aloy stops to pan the camera across the panoramic vista. The view reveals ancient broken metal structures and ruins scattered across a misty swamp valley, with mountains rising in the distance under the cloudy night sky. The character remains stationary, observing the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed, bioluminescent interior of a tribal village to a vast, moonlit panoramic vista. It begins as Aloy ascends narrow bamboo stairs through a covered walkway, where green lanterns cast a glow against woven walls and thatched roofing. As the path levels out, the space opens into a semi-covered common area centered around a large tree, moving past villagers and decorative fabrics on flat bamboo platforms. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through an archway and exits the settlement, causing the lighting to transition from artificial green hues to the natural dark blue of a moonlit night. Finally, the camera reaches an open overlook and pans across a misty swamp valley filled with ancient metal ruins and distant mountains under a cloudy sky.
